faqs.question: What session length and group options are available for Combination Massages at TouYuanTang Spa?
faqs.answer: This deal offers four options: a 60-Minute Body & Foot Combo Massage for singles, a 60-Minute Couples Body & Foot Combo Massage, a 90-Minute Body & Foot Combo Massage for singles, and a 90-Minute Couples Body & Foot Combo Massage. Each option is available with either Hot Stones or Crystal Jelly.

faqs.question: What type of massage add-on techniques are offered with the Combination Massages at TouYuanTang Spa?
faqs.answer: Each Body & Foot Combo Massage at TouYuanTang Spa can be performed with either Hot Stones or Crystal Jelly, and the spa also offers a scalp and hair massage treatment in addition to body massage services.

faqs.question: Where is TouYuanTang Spa located in Chicago, IL?
faqs.answer: TouYuanTang Spa is located in the Lake View East neighborhood at 3347 North Clark Street, Chicago, IL 60657.

faqs.question: What does the Body & Foot Combo Massage at TouYuanTang Spa include?
faqs.answer: The Combination Massages at TouYuanTang Spa include both a body massage and a foot massage within a single session, offered in 60-minute or 90-minute durations. Customers can choose between Hot Stones or Crystal Jelly as part of their treatment.

reviews.text: The staff were friendly and knowledgeable, and the overall experience was very relaxing!
reviews.author: Lindsey

reviews.text: My kids gave this treatment to me as a gift.  I can't believe I have never done this before.  It was 40 minutes that I want to do again and again.  My hair and scalp feel soft and clean, and I will be back! Highly recommend. Read More
reviews.author: Robin

reviews.text: It was a smooth experience. Felt a lot of relief by the end of the massage. Would go back.
reviews.author: Corey

reviews.text: This was definitely worth the drive, my partner & I we’ll be coming back very soon. Very professional staff and relaxing experience.
reviews.author: Jai
